docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BLUFORD, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-21-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-24-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-06-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AARON GRUBER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DEREK BLUFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM WAS FILED AND RECEIVED AFTER THE COURT HEARING. REQUEST WAS UNTIMELY. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AMY BRODSKY FILED BY DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM AMY BRODSKY FILED BY DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM AMY BRODSKY FILED BY DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. NOT TIMELY.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF DEREK BLUFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC IS PRESENT VIA AN UNAUTHORIZED ZOOMGOV APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY AMY BRODSKY, SR.MANAGER OF COMPLIANCE. ****THE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST.*** THIS IS THE SECOND TIME THE DEFENDANT WAS DENIED FOR UNTIMELY ZOOM APPEARACE REQUEST. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUFORD, DEREK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC $540.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ABC LEGAL SERVICES, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
